original_image_tags: A blue ink stamp located to the right of "B. APPROX." reads "1929".

elements.description: A typed teletype document from the Federal Bureau of Investigation Communications Section, dated April 27, 1964, regarding an Unidentified Flying Object incident in Socorro, New Mexico. The page contains typed body text, a distribution list, various handwritten annotations, and multiple official stamps.

judge.reason: Description A claims a specific visual stamp reading '1929' while Description B states the page contains only typed text and annotations with no mention of any such stamp, creating a direct contradiction on the presence and content of a visual element.
